'''zavubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidicin|cnidicin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidicin|cnidicin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zavubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zævibith|zævibith]] || [[word:zævibij|zævibij]] || [[word:zævibish|zævibish]] || [[word:zævibi|zævibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavuvubuth|zavuvubuth]] || [[word:zavuvubuj|zavuvubuj]] || [[word:zavuvubush|zavuvubush]] || [[word:zavuvubu|zavuvubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavubuth|zavubuth]] || [[word:zavubuj|zavubuj]] || [[word:zavubush|zavubush]] || [[word:zavubu|zavubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavufbuth|zavufbuth]] || [[word:zavufbuj|zavufbuj]] || [[word:zavufbush|zavufbush]] || [[word:zavufbuf|zavufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zavubuthu|zavubuthu]] || [[word:zavubuju|zavubuju]] || [[word:zavubushu|zavubushu]] || [[word:zavubuku|zavubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zavubuth|zavubuth]] || [[word:zavubuj|zavubuj]] || [[word:zavubush|zavubush]] || [[word:zavubu|zavubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zavubuthul|zavubuthul]] || [[word:zavubujul|zavubujul]] || [[word:zavubushul|zavubushul]] || [[word:zavubukul|zavubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zavubuthuthu|zavubuthuthu]] || [[word:zavubujuju|zavubujuju]] || [[word:zavubushushu|zavubushushu]] || [[word:zavubuku|zavubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zavubuthun|zavubuthun]] || [[word:zavubujun|zavubujun]] || [[word:zavubushun|zavubushun]] || [[word:zavubukun|zavubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zavubuthuoro|zavubuthuoro]] || [[word:zavubujuoro|zavubujuoro]] || [[word:zavubushuoro|zavubushuoro]] || [[word:zavubukuoro|zavubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
